nodes.name: ChatInputFooter.tsx
nodes.summary: Coordinates the chat composer footer, combining prompt input focus, slash-command and file search previewing, linked issues, question overlays, errors, and send/stop behavior.

nodes.name: ChatComposerControls.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the footer control strip for model selection, permission mode, plus-menu actions, thinking-level selection, and stop/send affordances.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing ChatComposerControls from its component folder.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the chat input drop-zone component used by the composer footer.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the shortcut hint component for chat input controls.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the file drop overlay displayed during drag-and-drop attachment flows.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the linked issue pill component reused by chat and prompt issue-link displays.

nodes.name: LinkedIssues.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the selected task or issue links above the chat input and wires each pill's remove action back to the footer state.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the LinkedIssues list component from its folder.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the question-answer overlay used when an agent asks for user input.

nodes.name: SlashCommandPreview.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a live slash-command preview panel, resolving command definitions, extracted parameters, unresolved placeholders, and editable parameter fields for the current prompt.

nodes.name: SlashCommandParamField.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a labeled text input for a single slash-command parameter and reports edits through a field-aware callback.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the SlashCommandParamField component.

nodes.name: slash-command-preview.model.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for slash-command preview parsing and input rebuilding behavior, covering the model helpers used by the preview UI.

nodes.name: slash-command-preview.model.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the slash-command preview model: input normalization, argument parsing, parameter field extraction, placeholder detection, and reconstruction after field edits.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing ChatInputFooter to chat pane consumers.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Defines shared chat input footer data shapes, including linked issue/task references used by footer subcomponents.

nodes.name: getErrorMessage.ts
nodes.summary: Normalizes unknown error values into a displayable message for the chat input footer error area.

nodes.name: McpOverviewPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders an MCP server overview popover with connection state, transport metadata, status badges, and authentication actions.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the MCP overview picker component.

nodes.name: ModelPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the model picker popover, groups available models by provider, checks provider authentication status, and links users to model settings.

nodes.name: ModelProviderGroup.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders one provider section in the model picker, including provider-specific auth headings and selectable models for that provider.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the Anthropic provider heading used in model provider groups.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the OpenAI provider heading used in model provider groups.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing ModelProviderGroup from its folder.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the ModelPicker component.

nodes.name: groupModelsByProvider.ts
nodes.summary: Groups chat model options by provider while preserving provider order for rendering in the model picker.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export exposing the groupModelsByProvider utility.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Defines provider logo labels and a provider-to-logo lookup used by the model picker UI.

nodes.name: PermissionModePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the permission mode picker menu with selectable modes, labels, descriptions, and active-mode styling for chat execution permissions.

nodes.name: ChatInputFooter
nodes.summary: Coordinates all chat input footer state and handlers, including prompt focus, slash-command previews, linked issues, file search, question responses, and send/stop actions.

nodes.name: ChatComposerControls
nodes.summary: Composes model, permission, plus-menu, thinking-level, and stop controls into the chat composer footer control strip.

nodes.name: LinkedIssues
nodes.summary: Maps linked issue references into removable pill controls shown above the chat input.

nodes.name: resolveFieldValue
nodes.summary: Resolves a slash-command parameter's displayed value from named or positional parsed argument maps.

nodes.name: SlashCommandPreview
nodes.summary: Builds the live slash-command preview UI by querying command preview data, deriving parameter fields, and applying field edits back into the prompt input.

nodes.name: SlashCommandParamField
nodes.summary: Renders one slash-command parameter input with a generated id, required indicator, and change callback.

nodes.name: mergeParamField
nodes.summary: Merges a discovered parameter field into the field map while preserving named and positional metadata.

nodes.name: extractParamFieldsFromHint
nodes.summary: Extracts named and positional parameter field definitions from slash-command argument hints.

nodes.name: mergeUnresolvedNamedFields
nodes.summary: Adds fields for unresolved named placeholders that appear in the preview prompt but are missing from the parsed command metadata.

nodes.name: mergeParsedNamedFields
nodes.summary: Merges named arguments already present in parsed input into the preview field list.

nodes.name: normalizeSlashPreviewInput
nodes.summary: Normalizes raw prompt text into the slash-command input form expected by preview parsing.

nodes.name: parseSlashInput
nodes.summary: Parses normalized slash-command input into the command token, command name, named entries, and positional tokens.

nodes.name: buildNextSlashInput
nodes.summary: Rebuilds slash-command input after a parameter value change while preserving argument ordering and quoting.

nodes.name: extractUnresolvedNamedPlaceholders
nodes.summary: Finds unique unresolved named placeholders in a slash-command preview prompt.

nodes.name: buildParamFields
nodes.summary: Combines command hint fields, unresolved placeholders, and parsed arguments into the ordered parameter fields displayed by the preview UI.

nodes.name: resolveSlashCommandDefinition
nodes.summary: Finds the slash-command definition that matches a preview command name or alias.

nodes.name: getNamedValueMap
nodes.summary: Builds a lookup map from named slash-command argument keys to their parsed values.

nodes.name: getPositionalValueMap
nodes.summary: Builds an index-to-value lookup map for parsed positional slash-command arguments.

nodes.name: getErrorMessage
nodes.summary: Converts unknown error values into a user-facing string, falling back to a generic message when needed.

nodes.name: getStateClassName
nodes.summary: Maps MCP server connection state values to badge class names for visual status display.

nodes.name: formatStateLabel
nodes.summary: Formats MCP server state values into human-readable status labels.

nodes.name: formatTransportLabel
nodes.summary: Formats MCP transport identifiers into labels shown in the server overview list.

nodes.name: McpOverviewPicker
nodes.summary: Renders the MCP overview popover, grouping server rows with transport details, state labels, and authentication controls.

nodes.name: ModelPicker
nodes.summary: Builds the model picker popover by grouping models, checking provider auth status, and rendering provider groups with settings navigation.

nodes.name: ModelProviderGroup
nodes.summary: Renders a provider-specific model list with auth prompts and per-model selection behavior.

nodes.name: groupModelsByProvider
nodes.summary: Transforms a flat model list into provider groups for the model picker.

nodes.name: PermissionModePicker
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown menu for selecting chat permission mode and displays the active mode in the trigger button.
